documentation.xhtml: ---- AXIS REFERENCES (declared in your hardware config) ---- XAXIS, yAxis : AXIS_REF; // already exist in the project ============ COMMAND FLAGS : LD (Inputs) -> SFC ============
============ Z AXIS — MODBUS I/O (CS2RS-D1008) ============= ============ TRAY / GRID CONFIG (read by GridCalc) ========
TRUE = disable Z drive; FALSE (default) = enabled

===================================================================== GVL "GVL_Shared" — globals shared across the LD / CFC / SFC / ST POUs (Splitting one POU into four means the formerly-local VARs become globals grouped by owner. Comment // [owner->reader] shows the data direction.) =====================================================================

ST.xhtml: state := 33; end_effector := TRUE;
state := 63; end_effector := FALSE;
state:=40; Z_DO_Down := FALSE; Z_Trig := FALSE; z_saw_moving:=FALSE; z_wait_count:=0;

inVariable.expression: (xy_moving AND gMoveDone) AND stop_request AND (patty_index < TOTAL_PATTIES)

attributes.attribute: (xy_moving AND gMoveDone) AND stop_request AND (patty_index < TOTAL_PATTIES)

Library.Name: #BreakpointLogging
Library.DefaultResolution: Breakpoint Logging Functions, 3.5.5.0 (3S - Smart Software Solutions GmbH)

Value.name: _x0034_00010
Value.desc: Devices of the LocalBus master device

Parameter.Name: LocalBusMaster Info
Parameter.Description: Devices of the LocalBus master device

Value.name: _x0038_05306369
Value.desc: Show the logger page for the master

Parameter.Name: ShowLoggerPage
Parameter.Description: Show the logger page for the master

Value.name: _x0038_05392650
Value.desc: true: transmit only ARP broadcasts, false: transmit all broadcasts

Parameter.Name: OnlyArpBroadcasts
Parameter.Description: true: transmit only ARP broadcasts, false: transmit all broadcasts

Value.name: _x0038_05458944
Value.desc: Send frame at task cycle start

Parameter.Name: FrameAtTaskStart
Parameter.Description: Send frame at task cycle start

Value.name: _x0038_05458960
Value.desc: Wait for packets in the same cycle/ FrameAtTaskStart must be also set

Parameter.Name: WaitForPacket
Parameter.Description: Wait for packets in the same cycle/ FrameAtTaskStart must be also set

Value.name: _x0038_05458968
Value.desc: Splits cylic frames in process data and asynchronous messages

Parameter.Name: SplitFrame
Parameter.Description: Splits cylic frames in process data and asynchronous messages

Value.name: _x0038_05459968
Value.desc: Export ENI file with custom settings

Parameter.Name: IgnoreManualAddres
Parameter.Description: Export ENI file with custom settings

Value.name: _x0038_05459969
Value.desc: Ignore manual address settings in the ENI export

Parameter.Name: IgnoreManualAddress
Parameter.Description: Ignore manual address settings in the ENI export

Value.name: _x0031_073741826
Value.desc: Number of Slaves with an Output

Parameter.Name: NumberOfOutputSlaves
Parameter.Description: Number of Slaves with an Output

Value.name: _x0031_073741827
Value.desc: Number of Slaves with an Input

Parameter.Name: NumberOfInputSlaves
Parameter.Description: Number of Slaves with an Input

Value.name: _x0031_073741829
Value.desc: Two zero Bytes and the First Two Bytes of the Source Address

Parameter.Name: SrcAddress1
Parameter.Description: Two zero Bytes and the First Two Bytes of the Source Address

Value.name: _x0031_073741830
Value.desc: Lower 4 Bytes of the Source Address

Parameter.Name: SrcAddress2
Parameter.Description: Lower 4 Bytes of the Source Address

Value.name: _x0031_073741831
Value.desc: Two zero Bytes and the First Two Bytes of the Destination Address

Parameter.Name: DestAddress1
Parameter.Description: Two zero Bytes and the First Two Bytes of the Destination Address

Value.name: _x0031_073741832
Value.desc: Lower 4 Bytes of the Destination Address

Parameter.Name: DestAddress2
Parameter.Description: Lower 4 Bytes of the Destination Address

Value.name: _x0038_05306448
Value.visiblename: Timeout Preop to Safeop, SafeOp to Op
Value.desc: Timeout Preop to Safeop, SafeOp to Op

Parameter.Name: Timeout Preop to Safeop, SafeOp to Op
Parameter.Description: Timeout Preop to Safeop, SafeOp to Op

Value.name: _x0031_342504960
Value.visiblename: Number of RxPDOs of the Slave
Value.desc: Number of RxPDOs of the Slave

Parameter.Name: Number of RxPDOs of the Slave
Parameter.Description: Number of RxPDOs of the Slave

Value.name: _x0031_342636032
Value.visiblename: Number of TxPDOs of the Slave
Value.desc: Number of TxPDOs of the Slave

Parameter.Name: Number of TxPDOs of the Slave
Parameter.Description: Number of TxPDOs of the Slave

Value.name: _x0031_342177280
Value.visiblename: Number of SyncManagers of the Slave
Value.desc: Number of SyncManagers of the Slave

Parameter.Name: Number of SyncManagers of the Slave
Parameter.Description: Number of SyncManagers of the Slave

Value.name: _x0031_342177312
Value.visiblename: Number of FMMUs of the Slave
Value.desc: Number of FMMUs of the Slave

Parameter.Name: Number of FMMUs of the Slave
Parameter.Description: Number of FMMUs of the Slave

Value.name: _x0031_061
Value.desc: Modulo period value for modulo drives [u]

Parameter.Name: fPositionPeriod
Parameter.Description: Modulo period value for modulo drives [u]

Value.name: _x0031_062
Value.desc: The velocity ramp used for trajectories.

Parameter.Name: eRampType
Parameter.Description: The velocity ramp used for trajectories.

Value.name: _x0031_144
Value.desc: Jerk used for bringing acceleration to 0 when sin² ramp is interrupted.

Parameter.Name: fRampJerk
Parameter.Description: Jerk used for bringing acceleration to 0 when sin² ramp is interrupted.

Value.name: _x0031_203
Value.desc: Deceleration for stop on software error [u/s²]

Parameter.Name: fSWLimitDeceleration
Parameter.Description: Deceleration for stop on software error [u/s²]

Value.name: _x0031_250
Value.desc: Maximum distance that may be travelled for ramping down after a software error has been detected [u]

Parameter.Name: fSWErrorMaxDistance
Parameter.Description: Maximum distance that may be travelled for ramping down after a software error has been detected [u]

Value.name: _x0037_100
Value.desc: TRUE: when bRegulator is reset to FALSE, disable immediately (go to "Switch on disabled" directly); FALSE: go via "switched on" and "ready to switch on"

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bImmediateDisabling
Parameter.Description: TRUE: when bRegulator is reset to FALSE, disable immediately (go to "Switch on disabled" directly); FALSE: go via "switched on" and "ready to switch on"

Value.name: _x0037_101
Value.desc: cycles to wait in PRE_HOMING before setting Bit4

Parameter.Name: DSP402._uiPreHomingWait
Parameter.Description: cycles to wait in PRE_HOMING before setting Bit4

Value.name: _x0037_102
Value.desc: cycles to wait in HOMING_DONE after homing (precond.: bRegulatorOn=TRUE)

Parameter.Name: DSP402._uiPostHomingWait
Parameter.Description: cycles to wait in HOMING_DONE after homing (precond.: bRegulatorOn=TRUE)

Value.name: _x0037_103
Value.desc: number of cycles at beginning of HOMING, where done bits are ignored

Parameter.Name: DSP402._uiHomingMinCycles
Parameter.Description: number of cycles at beginning of HOMING, where done bits are ignored

Value.name: _x0037_104
Value.desc: cycles to wait until detecting an failure and switching back

Parameter.Name: DSP402._uiWaitCyclesForStateSwitch
Parameter.Description: cycles to wait until detecting an failure and switching back

Value.name: _x0037_105
Value.desc: TRUE: before starting the homing procedure (by setting Bit4) wait that Bit12 is FALSE

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bPreHomingWaitBit12Clear
Parameter.Description: TRUE: before starting the homing procedure (by setting Bit4) wait that Bit12 is FALSE

Value.name: _x0037_106
Value.desc: TRUE: switch to HOMING_DONE if Bit12 AND Bit10 is true (correct acc. DSP402); FALSE: ignore Bit10

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bCheckBit10PostHoming
Parameter.Description: TRUE: switch to HOMING_DONE if Bit12 AND Bit10 is true (correct acc. DSP402); FALSE: ignore Bit10

Value.name: _x0037_107
Value.desc: FALSE: do not re-read and check if mode has been accepted by the drive

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bCheckOpMode
Parameter.Description: FALSE: do not re-read and check if mode has been accepted by the drive

Value.name: _x0037_108
Value.desc: (only relevant when _bImmediateDisabling=TRUE) TRUE: the drive is step by step disabled until the drive signals to be in "Ready to switch on" before a new enable command is processed.

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bForbidReenableDuringDisabling
Parameter.Description: (only relevant when _bImmediateDisabling=TRUE) TRUE: the drive is step by step disabled until the drive signals to be in "Ready to switch on" before a new enable command is processed.

Value.name: _x0037_109
Value.desc: TRUE: AxisIsReadyForMotion checks bit 12 in CSP or IP, FALSE: AxisIsReadyForMotion does not check bit 12.

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bCheckBit12InPositionMode
Parameter.Description: TRUE: AxisIsReadyForMotion checks bit 12 in CSP or IP, FALSE: AxisIsReadyForMotion does not check bit 12.

Value.name: _x0037_110
Value.desc: TRUE: when MC_Stop interrupts MC_Halt abort homing with Bit8; FALSE: do not set Bit8 but directly switch operation mode.

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bDoHaltWhenStopInterruptsHome
Parameter.Description: TRUE: when MC_Stop interrupts MC_Halt abort homing with Bit8; FALSE: do not set Bit8 but directly switch operation mode.

Value.name: _x0037_111
Value.desc: TRUE: in HOMING_ACTIVE, wStatusWord.13 = TRUE leads to errorstop and (depending on _bDoHaltWhenStopInterruptsHome) wControlWord.8 := TRUE.

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bCheckBit13InHomingMode
Parameter.Description: TRUE: in HOMING_ACTIVE, wStatusWord.13 = TRUE leads to errorstop and (depending on _bDoHaltWhenStopInterruptsHome) wControlWord.8 := TRUE.

Value.name: _x0037_112
Value.desc: TRUE: set bit 4 of status word also in CSP mode. Some drives require this, although it is non-standard.

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bSetControlBit4InCSP
Parameter.Description: TRUE: set bit 4 of status word also in CSP mode. Some drives require this, although it is non-standard.

Value.name: _x0037_113
Value.desc: In state HOMING_ACTIVE, do not listen to bit 13 during this number of cycles from setting bit 4.(Some drives need some time to reset bit 13.)

Parameter.Name: DSP402._uiHomingWaitListeningBit13
Parameter.Description: In state HOMING_ACTIVE, do not listen to bit 13 during this number of cycles from setting bit 4.(Some drives need some time to reset bit 13.)

Value.name: _x0037_114
Value.desc: Only relevant when _bImmediateDisabling=FALSE. Bit-Mask of the states for which immediate disabling turned on. - Bit 0: Normal operation - Bit 1: Quickstop - Bit 2: External Quickstop - Bit 3: Homing Example: assuming _bImmediateDisabling is FALSE, the value 2#0110 means that only for states 'Normal operation' and 'Homing', immediate disabling is turned off. For states 'Quickstop' and 'External Quickstop', immediate disabling is turned on.

Parameter.Name: DSP402._dwStatesImmediateDisabling
Parameter.Description: Only relevant when _bImmediateDisabling=FALSE. Bit-Mask of the states for which immediate disabling turned on. - Bit 0: Normal operation - Bit 1: Quickstop - Bit 2: External Quickstop - Bit 3: Homing Example: assuming _bImmediateDisabling is FALSE, the value 2#0110 means that only for states 'Normal operation' and 'Homing', immediate disabling is turned off. For states 'Quickstop' and 'External Quickstop', immediate disabling is turned on.

Value.name: _x0037_115
Value.desc: Whether bit 4 of the status word, voltage enabled, needs to be TRUE for bRegulatorRealState to become TRUE.

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bRegulatorOnRequiresVoltageEnabled
Parameter.Description: Whether bit 4 of the status word, voltage enabled, needs to be TRUE for bRegulatorRealState to become TRUE.

Value.name: _x0037_116
Value.desc: Whether bit 2 of the status word, operation enabled, needs to be TRUE for bDriveStartRealState to become TRUE.

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bDriveStartRequiresOperationEnabled
Parameter.Description: Whether bit 2 of the status word, operation enabled, needs to be TRUE for bDriveStartRealState to become TRUE.

Value.name: _x0038_05306448
Value.visiblename: Timeout Preop to Safeop, SafeOp to Op
Value.desc: Timeout Preop to Safeop, SafeOp to Op

Parameter.Name: Timeout Preop to Safeop, SafeOp to Op
Parameter.Description: Timeout Preop to Safeop, SafeOp to Op

Value.name: _x0031_342504960
Value.visiblename: Number of RxPDOs of the Slave
Value.desc: Number of RxPDOs of the Slave

Parameter.Name: Number of RxPDOs of the Slave
Parameter.Description: Number of RxPDOs of the Slave

Value.name: _x0031_342636032
Value.visiblename: Number of TxPDOs of the Slave
Value.desc: Number of TxPDOs of the Slave

Parameter.Name: Number of TxPDOs of the Slave
Parameter.Description: Number of TxPDOs of the Slave

Value.name: _x0031_342177280
Value.visiblename: Number of SyncManagers of the Slave
Value.desc: Number of SyncManagers of the Slave

Parameter.Name: Number of SyncManagers of the Slave
Parameter.Description: Number of SyncManagers of the Slave

Value.name: _x0031_342177312
Value.visiblename: Number of FMMUs of the Slave
Value.desc: Number of FMMUs of the Slave

Parameter.Name: Number of FMMUs of the Slave
Parameter.Description: Number of FMMUs of the Slave

Value.name: _x0031_061
Value.desc: Modulo period value for modulo drives [u]

Parameter.Name: fPositionPeriod
Parameter.Description: Modulo period value for modulo drives [u]

Value.name: _x0031_062
Value.desc: The velocity ramp used for trajectories.

Parameter.Name: eRampType
Parameter.Description: The velocity ramp used for trajectories.

Value.name: _x0031_144
Value.desc: Jerk used for bringing acceleration to 0 when sin² ramp is interrupted.

Parameter.Name: fRampJerk
Parameter.Description: Jerk used for bringing acceleration to 0 when sin² ramp is interrupted.

Value.name: _x0031_203
Value.desc: Deceleration for stop on software error [u/s²]

Parameter.Name: fSWLimitDeceleration
Parameter.Description: Deceleration for stop on software error [u/s²]

Value.name: _x0031_250
Value.desc: Maximum distance that may be travelled for ramping down after a software error has been detected [u]

Parameter.Name: fSWErrorMaxDistance
Parameter.Description: Maximum distance that may be travelled for ramping down after a software error has been detected [u]

Value.name: _x0037_100
Value.desc: TRUE: when bRegulator is reset to FALSE, disable immediately (go to "Switch on disabled" directly); FALSE: go via "switched on" and "ready to switch on"

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bImmediateDisabling
Parameter.Description: TRUE: when bRegulator is reset to FALSE, disable immediately (go to "Switch on disabled" directly); FALSE: go via "switched on" and "ready to switch on"

Value.name: _x0037_101
Value.desc: cycles to wait in PRE_HOMING before setting Bit4

Parameter.Name: DSP402._uiPreHomingWait
Parameter.Description: cycles to wait in PRE_HOMING before setting Bit4

Value.name: _x0037_102
Value.desc: cycles to wait in HOMING_DONE after homing (precond.: bRegulatorOn=TRUE)

Parameter.Name: DSP402._uiPostHomingWait
Parameter.Description: cycles to wait in HOMING_DONE after homing (precond.: bRegulatorOn=TRUE)

Value.name: _x0037_103
Value.desc: number of cycles at beginning of HOMING, where done bits are ignored

Parameter.Name: DSP402._uiHomingMinCycles
Parameter.Description: number of cycles at beginning of HOMING, where done bits are ignored

Value.name: _x0037_104
Value.desc: cycles to wait until detecting an failure and switching back

Parameter.Name: DSP402._uiWaitCyclesForStateSwitch
Parameter.Description: cycles to wait until detecting an failure and switching back

Value.name: _x0037_105
Value.desc: TRUE: before starting the homing procedure (by setting Bit4) wait that Bit12 is FALSE

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bPreHomingWaitBit12Clear
Parameter.Description: TRUE: before starting the homing procedure (by setting Bit4) wait that Bit12 is FALSE

Value.name: _x0037_106
Value.desc: TRUE: switch to HOMING_DONE if Bit12 AND Bit10 is true (correct acc. DSP402); FALSE: ignore Bit10

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bCheckBit10PostHoming
Parameter.Description: TRUE: switch to HOMING_DONE if Bit12 AND Bit10 is true (correct acc. DSP402); FALSE: ignore Bit10

Value.name: _x0037_107
Value.desc: FALSE: do not re-read and check if mode has been accepted by the drive

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bCheckOpMode
Parameter.Description: FALSE: do not re-read and check if mode has been accepted by the drive

Value.name: _x0037_108
Value.desc: (only relevant when _bImmediateDisabling=TRUE) TRUE: the drive is step by step disabled until the drive signals to be in "Ready to switch on" before a new enable command is processed.

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bForbidReenableDuringDisabling
Parameter.Description: (only relevant when _bImmediateDisabling=TRUE) TRUE: the drive is step by step disabled until the drive signals to be in "Ready to switch on" before a new enable command is processed.

Value.name: _x0037_109
Value.desc: TRUE: AxisIsReadyForMotion checks bit 12 in CSP or IP, FALSE: AxisIsReadyForMotion does not check bit 12.

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bCheckBit12InPositionMode
Parameter.Description: TRUE: AxisIsReadyForMotion checks bit 12 in CSP or IP, FALSE: AxisIsReadyForMotion does not check bit 12.

Value.name: _x0037_110
Value.desc: TRUE: when MC_Stop interrupts MC_Halt abort homing with Bit8; FALSE: do not set Bit8 but directly switch operation mode.

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bDoHaltWhenStopInterruptsHome
Parameter.Description: TRUE: when MC_Stop interrupts MC_Halt abort homing with Bit8; FALSE: do not set Bit8 but directly switch operation mode.

Value.name: _x0037_111
Value.desc: TRUE: in HOMING_ACTIVE, wStatusWord.13 = TRUE leads to errorstop and (depending on _bDoHaltWhenStopInterruptsHome) wControlWord.8 := TRUE.

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bCheckBit13InHomingMode
Parameter.Description: TRUE: in HOMING_ACTIVE, wStatusWord.13 = TRUE leads to errorstop and (depending on _bDoHaltWhenStopInterruptsHome) wControlWord.8 := TRUE.

Value.name: _x0037_112
Value.desc: TRUE: set bit 4 of status word also in CSP mode. Some drives require this, although it is non-standard.

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bSetControlBit4InCSP
Parameter.Description: TRUE: set bit 4 of status word also in CSP mode. Some drives require this, although it is non-standard.

Value.name: _x0037_113
Value.desc: In state HOMING_ACTIVE, do not listen to bit 13 during this number of cycles from setting bit 4.(Some drives need some time to reset bit 13.)

Parameter.Name: DSP402._uiHomingWaitListeningBit13
Parameter.Description: In state HOMING_ACTIVE, do not listen to bit 13 during this number of cycles from setting bit 4.(Some drives need some time to reset bit 13.)

Value.name: _x0037_114
Value.desc: Only relevant when _bImmediateDisabling=FALSE. Bit-Mask of the states for which immediate disabling turned on. - Bit 0: Normal operation - Bit 1: Quickstop - Bit 2: External Quickstop - Bit 3: Homing Example: assuming _bImmediateDisabling is FALSE, the value 2#0110 means that only for states 'Normal operation' and 'Homing', immediate disabling is turned off. For states 'Quickstop' and 'External Quickstop', immediate disabling is turned on.

Parameter.Name: DSP402._dwStatesImmediateDisabling
Parameter.Description: Only relevant when _bImmediateDisabling=FALSE. Bit-Mask of the states for which immediate disabling turned on. - Bit 0: Normal operation - Bit 1: Quickstop - Bit 2: External Quickstop - Bit 3: Homing Example: assuming _bImmediateDisabling is FALSE, the value 2#0110 means that only for states 'Normal operation' and 'Homing', immediate disabling is turned off. For states 'Quickstop' and 'External Quickstop', immediate disabling is turned on.

Value.name: _x0037_115
Value.desc: Whether bit 4 of the status word, voltage enabled, needs to be TRUE for bRegulatorRealState to become TRUE.

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bRegulatorOnRequiresVoltageEnabled
Parameter.Description: Whether bit 4 of the status word, voltage enabled, needs to be TRUE for bRegulatorRealState to become TRUE.

Value.name: _x0037_116
Value.desc: Whether bit 2 of the status word, operation enabled, needs to be TRUE for bDriveStartRealState to become TRUE.

Parameter.Name: DSP402._bDriveStartRequiresOperationEnabled
Parameter.Description: Whether bit 2 of the status word, operation enabled, needs to be TRUE for bDriveStartRealState to become TRUE.

Value.name: _x0033_000
Value.visiblename: Number of pulses for one revolution

Parameter.Name: Number of pulses for one revolution

Value.name: _x0033_001
Value.visiblename: The displacement for one revolution of the workbench

Parameter.Name: The displacement for one revolution of the workbench
